title: Vanilla Ultimate
description: Improves vanilla Minecraft and adds tons more!
body:
# A Modpack That Improves Vanilla Minecraft and Adds More Features!
![A Modpack That Improves Vanilla Minecraft and Adds More Features!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/db813e970024f4d04f9ff37af9d3bb4686da99e0.png)

Vanilla Ultimate is a vanilla plus modpack that adds new structures, overhauls the nether/end, improves biomes, improves gameplay, and makes the game look and feel soooo much better while still keeping a fairly vanilla-like style. If you do not have a very powerful device and the modpack is very laggy or just does not let Minecraft launch try the lite version. (Link To Lite Version: [https://modrinth.com/modpack/vanilla-ultimate-lite](https://modrinth.com/modpack/vanilla-ultimate-lite)

Neapik RTX Java: [https://www.patreon.com/posts/neapik-rtx-java-69417326](https://www.patreon.com/posts/neapik-rtx-java-69417326)

VanillaTweak is allowed in my pack according to their terms to my understanding (credit: [https://vanillatweaks.net/](https://vanillatweaks.net))
